title: 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing data for Gilbert et al 2026
author: Gilbert, Naomi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw fastq data for 16S rRNA amplicons genereated for Gilbert et al 2026. the 16S rRNA gene was amplified using universal Illumina V3-V4 primers (Klindworth et al. 2013) and amplicons sequenced on an Illumina MiSeq (Laragen). 
 Reference: 
 Klindworth, A. et al. Evaluation of general 16S ribosomal RNA gene PCR primers for classical and next-generation sequencing-based diversity studies. Nucleic Acids Res. 41, e1 (2013). https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gks808
